---
title: "Reproducing figure 5a"
author: "Harchit Kaur"
date: today 
project: 
  output-dir: Output
  execute-dir: project
toc: true 
format: 
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
editor: visual 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  warning: false 
  message: false
  freeze: false 
---

## Prepare Session

```{r}
#| label: libraries and data import 
#| echo: false


library(ROCR)
#library(MetaIntegrator)
library(ggplot2)
library(parallel)
library(OptimalCutpoints)
library(data.table)
library(xgboost)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)


df <- read.csv("Data/processed/41698_2025_1043_MOESM3_ESM.csv")

```

```{r}
#| label: clean dataset

#create outcome variable y
df$y <- ifelse(df$group == "lung cancer", 1, 0)

#clean smoking variable 
df$smoking_binary <- ifelse(df$smokingstatus == "never", 0, 1)

#compute AUC function 

get_auc <- function(pred, truth) {
  roc_obj <- roc(truth, pred)
  
  auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))
  ci_vals <- ci.auc(roc_obj)
  
  data.frame(
    auc = auc_val,
    lower_ci = ci_vals[1],
    upper_ci = ci_vals[3]
  )
}
```

##  Fit models

```{r}
#| label: build models

```
